scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm -w backend run start:dev" "npm -w app run web"
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @linku/shared run typecheck && npm -w backend run typecheck && npm -w app run typecheck
scripts.setup: npm install && npm -w backend run prisma:generate && npm -w backend run prisma:migrate && npm -w backend run seed
